We
Made
It
Through
Another
Week.
Hell
Yeah
Us!
Take
Some
Time
To
Celebrate
That
Victory.
Have
An
Eclectic
Mix
Of
Memes
That
I’ve
Collected
As
A
Long
Time
Lurker.
You
Are
An
Awesome
Being.
Don’t
Forget
To
Be
Kind
To
Yourself.
item.dc:creator: professorwigglemuffins

item.title: Bridges For Nanna
item.description:
This is my 18 year old blind and deaf dog Nanna We've been on an unusual mission the last month.
We moved to Minneapolis 2 months ago, it's been fun having all new places to explore with my dogs I realized pretty quickly that Nanna had a brand new love
Every time we were on a bridge over the Mississippi River, Nanna would stop in her tracks to look over the edge and feel the breeze on her face It was the most at peace I've ever seen her.
So I've made it my goal to bring Nanna to every bridge in Minneapolis and St Paul so she can feel the breeze
For some reason these Tweets started popping off I had never even had a fraction of those views before
So Nanna starred getting some attention and some really cool things have come from it
First it was the local news, this story will be sometime next month
Then it was the local NPR whose coming with us to the next bridge in a week And the biggest one, the one you probably all already know -
Keep and eye out for Nanna Pants as WeRateDogs features her to their 9 million followers! If she doesn't get a 1,000/10 - we riot at dawn!
As much as I love Nanna getting all this attention at 18 years old, it feels kinda funny that it's about this bridge thing Nanna has done way cooler stuff than this lol, but I'm really happy that people enjoy her adventures
If it encourages just one person in the world to someday adopt an old special needs dog then all the posts were worth it. 6 pedestrian friendly bridges down, about 20 more left to go!
I also wanted to take a moment to thank everyone whose been involved lately with TheFreePizzaDude, it feels like we've had a bit of a resurgence towards the end of year 4 More helpers, more upvoters, more people sending food and helping out with the Meal Fund contributions
We had our biggest post of the year, then our biggest grocery post, new Angels popping up on posts and more people upvoting I keep hoping the project doesn't just fade away and all you amazing people keep making sure that it doesn't I really appreciate it so much.
Nanna isn't just being dropped off near bridges and standing there, she's still doing some insane exercise Yesterday was her longest adventure ever! 7 miles, 18 years old, I'm just the proudest goddamn dog owner in the world.
I moved here because my parents are sick, but I could've never imagined the new life it would bring out of my dogs. Everyone is happy here, they're all crushing miles and I'd have to say we are closer as a family than we've ever been before. I'm excited for the next bridge Nanna Pants, get ready to feel the breeze on your beautiful eyeless face. ... TheFreePizzaDude tomorrow, Saturday at 1pm central! If you can't make it but would still like to help, you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and one of us will send the food for you! Anonymous Angels have been so huge for us, I love you all so much https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude ... Ill be back soon with Nanna on the news and WeRateDogs! Hope you all have a beautiful weekend.
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: One year HRT anniversary!
item.description: Yes, I've always been a nerd. Now I'm a shieldmaiden on the teaching front lines instead of viking reenactment! ?? I can finally recognize myself after struggling since childhood. Facial feminization surgery in 6 weeks. Will travel alone to Spain for major surgery. Wish me luck! ?️‍⚧️❤️

item.title: SSG Jordan Bear
item.description: On this Memorial Day, please pause to remember those we have lost, like my nephew, Staff Sgt. Jordan Bear, KIA Zahary, Kandahar, Afghanistan March 1, 2012. RENDEZVOUS I have a rendezvous with Death At some disputed barricade, When Spring comes back with rustling shade And apple-blossoms fill the air - I have a rendezvous with Death When Spring brings back blue days and fair. It may be he shall take my hand And lead me into his dark land And close my eyes and quench my breath ­ It may be I shall pass him still. I have a rendezvous with Death On some scarred slope of battered hill, When Spring comes round again this year And the first meadow-flowers appear. God knows 'twere better to be deep Pillowed in silk and scented down, Where love throbs out in blissful sleep, Pulse nigh to pulse, and breath to breath, Where hushed awakenings are dear ... But I've a rendezvous with Death At midnight in some flaming town, When Spring trips north again this year, And I to my pledged word am true, I shall not fail that rendezvous. Alan Seeger 1888-1916
item.dc:creator: BrandonTeasdale

item.title: Images of Note: Forcefem King Charles
item.description:
Oh no
Orcas with drones, orcas with drones. Are they real? Yes they are. Orcas with drones, in no fly zones, they're killing people now.
WHAT?
yaay~
I mean the government openly thinks I shouldn't exist, why do you think I'm like the way I am.
This is what makes metal awesome and what freaks out non-metal fans.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii (I'm making a game about a man who lives in the Chicago bean.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay For Streeeeeeam: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Rotisserie Chicken Mushroom Soup Recipe
item.description:
What's Your Favorite Way to Enjoy Leftover Rotisserie Chicken? Rotisserie Chicken Mushroom Soup Recipe A Comforting Delight for Your Soul Prep Time: 15 minutes Total Time: 45 minutes Servings: 6 Ingredients: 2 tablespoons olive oil 1 medium onion, diced 2 cloves garlic, minced 8 ounces mushrooms, sliced 2 medium carrots, sliced 2 celery stalks, sliced 4 cups chicken broth 2 cups shredded rotisserie chicken 1 cup milk or cream 1/4 cup all-purpose flour 1 teaspoon dried thyme 1/2 teaspoon dried rosemary Salt and pepper to taste Fresh parsley, chopped for garnish Instructions: Full Recipe : https://sanepe.com/rotisserie-chicken-mushroom-soup-recipe/
Full Recipe : https://sanepe.com/rotisserie-chicken-mushroom-soup-recipe/
item.dc:creator: PatriciaRecipes
